languages.text: "Злополучный день. Задавайте свои вопросы и оставим эту тему".
"An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."
languages.original_text: "Злополучный день. Задавайте свои вопросы и оставим эту тему".

traits.locale_text: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, and let us leave this topic."
"An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, and let us leave this topic."
"An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."
"An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."

languages.text: "Ein unseliger Tag. Stellt Eure Fragen und dann lasst und das Thema wechseln."
languages.original_text: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."

traits.locale_text: "Ein unseliger Tag. Stellt Eure Fragen und dann lasst und das Thema wechseln."

languages.text: « Une journée bien sombre. Posez-moi vos questions, après quoi nous passerons à autre chose. »
languages.original_text: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."

traits.locale_text: « Une journée bien sombre. Posez-moi vos questions, après quoi nous passerons à autre chose. »

languages.text: «Un día funesto. Pregunte lo que quiera y dejemos después el tema».
languages.original_text: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."

traits.locale_text: «Un día funesto. Pregunte lo que quiera y dejemos después el tema».

languages.text: "Talihsiz bir gün. Sorularını sor, sonra da bu konuyu kapatalım."
languages.original_text: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."

traits.locale_text: "Talihsiz bir gün. Sorularını sor, sonra da bu konuyu kapatalım."

languages.text: “真是灾难性的一天。你问吧，之后就别再提这事了。”
languages.original_text: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."

traits.locale_text: “真是灾难性的一天。你问吧，之后就别再提这事了。”

languages.text: 「不吉な日。質問はどうぞ、そしてこの話題はここで終わりにしましょう。」
languages.original_text: "An ill-fated day. Ask your questions, then let us leave this topic."

traits.locale_text: 「不吉な日。質問はどうぞ、そしてこの話題はここで終わりにしましょう。」
